items.title: I’m the Max-Level Newbie
items.description:
Kang Jin-Hyeok, a gaming streamer, and content creator is the only person who has cleared the game, [Tower of Trials]. However, as the game’s popularity declines, it becomes increasingly difficult for him to continue making a living as a content creator. Jinhyeok prepares to end his 11-year-long relationship with the game and say goodbye to his humble group of subscribers. But on that very day, the Tower of Trials appears in reality with a message saying that humanity will perish unless all players clear each floor within 90 days. Jin-Hyeok, who knows the game better than anyone, decides to use his knowledge to his advantage and dominate the tower. It’s time to show everyone what a hardcore gamer can do!

(Source: Tappytoon, edited)

items.title: The World After the Fall
items.description:
Faced with imminent defeat and certain death, would you choose to run – or continue to fight for a doomed world? When mysterious towers appear across the world, summoning monsters that prey on mankind, this is the choice presented to the Tower Walkers – adventurers with special powers to fight the monsters. On the brink of death, they can choose to use a “regression stone” to return to the past for a second chance, though this decision places them in a separate timeline forever. Stubborn Tower Walker Jae-Hwan rejects this choice, choosing to fight for the original timeline, and learning shocking secrets about the Tower along the way.

(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

items.title: The Knight Only Lives Today
items.description:
Is dying repeatedly a blessing? Enkrid's life-long dream of becoming a knight looked to be forever out of reach, until one day he died... and woke up at the beginning of that same day! Now that he has unlimited chances to train and engage in mortal combat, just how far can he go?

(Source: WEBTOON)

items.title: Blink Master of the Magic Academy
items.description:
In the game Aether World, Baek Yuseol is considered the most useless character because he can't use magic like everyone else. His only skill, Blink, is a short-range teleportation ability most players consider worthless. But when he’s tasked with reaching the game's true ending, Baek Yuseol decides to use his unconventional skill to achieve this impossible goal. Can this so-called "trash" character outsmart his powerful peers, form unlikely alliances, and ultimately master the game?

(Source: Tapas)

items.title: The Tutorial Is Too Tough!
items.description:
Lee Ho-Jae had given up his life as a pro gamer, until one day he received a mysterious message:

“Congratulations! You’ve been invited to the Tutorial World.”

Intrigued, he enters the game and confidently chooses “hell” difficulty, but soon learns that he is trapped there. With a mere 0.01% survival rate, Ho-Jae must somehow overcome the game’s agonizing challenges to figure out the real reason he was invited. This tutorial may be tough, but its secrets are what’s truly hellacious.

(Source: Tapas, edited)

items.title: The Player Hides His Past
items.description:
The real world is suddenly ambushed by rifts that threaten to spill out monsters from the VR game “Chronicles of Arcana.” These rifts can only be closed by “players,” people who have awakened as their in-game characters with all the same stats and skills. Unfortunately for protagonist Lee Ho-Yeol, his awakening is the opposite of cool as his avatar happens to be the one he made during the height of his awkward phase in middle school, giving him all the mannerisms and speech of an absolute cringelord. Just how will he go on to become the hero humanity needs most?

(Source: WEBTOON, edited)

items.title: Helmut
items.description:
Helmut was only a baby when he was left in the Forest of Pahe, an evil place full of beasts where sinners are banished for eternity. Luckily, one magical beast and an exiled swordsman take pity on him and raise him as their own. But with a dark seed growing inside him, Helmut decides to take up the sword to prevent the seed from turning him evil. As Helmut grows stronger, he seeks out the family that abandoned him, but will Helmut end up following his human heart or his beastly instincts?

(Source: Tapas)

items.title: Nebula's Civilization
items.description:
Seong-Un Choi is the top-ranked player in the game "Lost World," being the only player to have completed all its achievements. However, his triumph is short-lived as a mysterious message transports him to the real "Lost World," transforming him from a mere gamer to a contender for godhood. Amidst others vying for divinity, will Seong-Un be able to achieve true godhood and reign supreme in this new realm?

(Source: WEBTOON)

items.title: What a Bountiful Harvest, Demon Lord!
items.description:
Who was that guy that once said, “An army marches on its stomach”? When hapless agricultural science student Jangcheol Kim starts playing the fantasy MMORPG “Paladins of Blood” to escape the stress of school life, he never imagined he would end up inside the game, much less as its final boss. How can a ruthless demon overlord win over his subjects? Perhaps with potatoes.

(Source: WEBTOON)

items.title: There's No Such Thing as a Bad Lady
items.description:
Raised in the slums of Ebelstein, Derek knows all too well that magic cannot bridge social divides. Through harsh lessons and hard-earned discipline, he rises to become a second-tier mage, scraping by as a mercenary. Life takes a different turn when he is appointed as a magical tutor to Diella Duplain-- the temperamental youngest daughter of a noble house, unable to wield magic despite her lineage. Though Derek is her last resort before exile to a convent, Diella clashes with him from the start. Together, will they be able to prove that there’s no such thing as a “bad” lady?

(Source: WEBTOON)
